vocab.api: Define routes with app.get(), app.post(), etc. Use Hono's c.json() for JSON responses. Hono runs on any JS runtime — Cloudflare Workers, Node.js, Deno, Bun. Use app.route() for modular routing.
vocab.authentication: Use Hono's built-in bearerAuth() middleware for Bearer token validation, or implement JWT validation with hono/jwt. For sessions, use cookies via getCookie/setCookie from hono/cookie.
vocab.validation: Use Zod Validator middleware (@hono/zod-validator). Define a schema with z.object() and apply with zValidator('json', schema) as route middleware. Invalid requests are rejected automatically.
vocab.middleware: Hono middleware uses the same handler signature as routes. Apply globally with app.use() or per-route. Built-in: logger(), cors(), compress(), secureHeaders().
vocab.performance: Hono is optimized for Edge runtimes. Use Hono's built-in router (TrieRouter or RegExpRouter) — no config needed. For Cloudflare Workers deployment, use wrangler.toml with entry point index.ts.
